name: comath-pi-lab
description: Auditable Pi-based agentic mathematics research workbench.

scripts.test: node scripts/phase0-smoke.mjs && corepack pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 --if-present test && node tests/e2e/phase45-pi-comathd-install-session.test.mjs && node tests/evaluation/phase17-integrity-evaluation.test.mjs
